therapeutic_areas: Diabetes and obesity (Eli Lilly and Company, Form 10-K for FY2023, Item 1. Business)
Oncology (Eli Lilly and Company, Form 10-K for FY2023, Item 1. Business)
Immunology/inflammation (Eli Lilly and Company, Form 10-K for FY2023, Item 1. Business)
Neuroscience (Eli Lilly and Company, Form 10-K for FY2023, Item 1. Business)
aging_relevance_reasoning: Lilly’s marketed portfolio includes incretin-based cardiometabolic therapies for type 2 diabetes and obesity/weight management (e.g., tirzepatide as Mounjaro/Zepbound; dulaglutide as Trulicity), which address conditions associated with increased risk of morbidity and mortality (Sources: FDA Drugs@FDA: Mounjaro (tirzepatide); FDA press announcement “FDA approves new medication for chronic weight management” (Zepbound): https://www.fda.gov/news-events/press-announcements/fda-approves-new-medication-chronic-weight-management ; Trulicity Drugs@FDA: https://www.accessdata.fda.gov/scripts/cder/daf/index.cfm?event=overview.process&ApplNo=125469 ; CDC obesity health effects: https://www.cdc.gov/obesity/basics/health-effects.html ; CDC diabetes overview: https://www.cdc.gov/diabetes/basics/diabetes.html). Lilly also markets immunomodulators such as the JAK inhibitor baricitinib (Olumiant), aligning mechanistically with the chronic inflammation/inflammaging theme in aging biology (Sources: Olumiant Drugs@FDA: https://www.accessdata.fda.gov/scripts/cder/daf/index.cfm?event=overview.process&ApplNo=207924 ; Franceschi C, Campisi J. “Chronic inflammation (inflammaging) and its potential contribution to age-associated diseases.” Nat Rev Immunol. 2014. doi:10.1038/nri3701). However, dedicated, explicitly labeled “anti-aging/longevity” clinical programs or endpoints are not clearly disclosed in public materials (source needed).

existing_longevity_assets.indication: Type 2 diabetes (Mounjaro); chronic weight management in adults with obesity or overweight with at least one weight-related condition (Zepbound)
existing_longevity_assets.relevance: Longevity relevance via cardiometabolic risk modification through treatment of obesity and type 2 diabetes, which are associated with adverse health outcomes (Sources: FDA Drugs@FDA: Mounjaro (tirzepatide); FDA press announcement (Zepbound): https://www.fda.gov/news-events/press-announcements/fda-approves-new-medication-chronic-weight-management ; CDC obesity health effects: https://www.cdc.gov/obesity/basics/health-effects.html ; CDC diabetes overview: https://www.cdc.gov/diabetes/basics/diabetes.html).
existing_longevity_assets.source: FDA Drugs@FDA: Mounjaro (tirzepatide); FDA press announcement (Zepbound): https://www.fda.gov/news-events/press-announcements/fda-approves-new-medication-chronic-weight-management

existing_longevity_assets.relevance: Longevity relevance through treatment of type 2 diabetes, a condition associated with major chronic disease complications (Source: Trulicity Drugs@FDA: https://www.accessdata.fda.gov/scripts/cder/daf/index.cfm?event=overview.process&ApplNo=125469 ; CDC diabetes overview: https://www.cdc.gov/diabetes/basics/diabetes.html).

existing_longevity_assets.indication: Inflammatory/autoimmune indications including rheumatoid arthritis and atopic dermatitis (per FDA label and subsequent approvals)
existing_longevity_assets.relevance: Longevity relevance as a systemic anti-inflammatory/immunomodulatory agent; chronic inflammation (“inflammaging”) is widely discussed as a contributor to age-associated pathology (Sources: Olumiant Drugs@FDA: https://www.accessdata.fda.gov/scripts/cder/daf/index.cfm?event=overview.process&ApplNo=207924 ; Franceschi C, Campisi J. Nat Rev Immunol. 2014. doi:10.1038/nri3701).

recent_acquisitions.relevance: Immunology-focused acquisition (clinical-stage), potentially relevant to aging via modulation of immune/inflammatory pathways (Source: Eli Lilly press release, June 20, 2023, “Lilly to acquire Dice Therapeutics for $2.4 billion”).
recent_acquisitions.source: Eli Lilly press release, June 20, 2023, “Lilly to acquire Dice Therapeutics for $2.4 billion” (reference; source needed for URL).

recent_acquisitions.relevance: Cardiometabolic/obesity-adjacent acquisition (bimagrumab), with potential relevance to late-life function and metabolic health (Source: Eli Lilly press release, July 18, 2023, “Lilly to acquire Versanis Bio for up to $1.93 billion”).
recent_acquisitions.source: Eli Lilly press release, July 18, 2023, “Lilly to acquire Versanis Bio for up to $1.93 billion” (reference; source needed for URL).

recent_acquisitions.relevance: Radioligand oncology acquisition (clinical-stage); aging relevance mainly indirect via cancer burden in older populations (Source: Eli Lilly press release, Oct 3, 2023, “Lilly to acquire POINT Biopharma for approximately $1.4 billion”).
recent_acquisitions.source: Eli Lilly press release, Oct 3, 2023, “Lilly to acquire POINT Biopharma for approximately $1.4 billion” (reference; source needed for URL).

acquisition_pattern.preferred_stage: Clinical-stage (based on 2023 acquisitions of Dice Therapeutics, Versanis Bio, and POINT Biopharma described by Lilly as clinical-stage in acquisition announcements) (Sources: Eli Lilly press releases dated June 20, 2023; July 18, 2023; Oct 3, 2023 — specific URLs source needed).
focus_areas: Immunology/inflammation (Dice Therapeutics acquisition; Source: Eli Lilly press release, June 20, 2023)
Cardiometabolic/obesity (Versanis Bio acquisition; Source: Eli Lilly press release, July 18, 2023)
Oncology/radioligands (POINT Biopharma acquisition; Source: Eli Lilly press release, Oct 3, 2023)
acquisition_pattern.recent_trend: Multiple billion-dollar acquisitions in 2023 spanning immunology and cardiometabolic/obesity, plus oncology (Sources: Eli Lilly press releases dated June 20, 2023; July 18, 2023; Oct 3, 2023). The avg_deal_size_usd value is computed from the disclosed headline deal values ($2.4B, up to $1.93B, and ~$1.4B) in those announcements.

sources: Eli Lilly and Company, Form 10-K for fiscal year ended 2023 (filed 2024), Item 1. Business and cover page (HQ, business areas, ticker) (reference; source needed for specific accession URL).
